attributes.action: Give trans folks their bathrooms back
attributes.additional_details:
Abolish the law forbidding trans men and women into using their non-preferred bathrooms. 
This new “law” will inevitably result in more trans deaths, mental health risks, physical attacks etc if not reversed at the earliest convenience.
If this is all about “protecting women and children”, why are we disregarding the trans youth of the UK? The repercussions that will come, given what this bill proposes, will be catastrophic.
If the king can ban conversion therapy, why are bathrooms a discussion?
attributes.background: Abolish the bill forcing trans men and women into their non-preferred bathrooms. Allow trans men in men’s bathrooms, and allow trans women in women’s bathrooms.

rejection.details: Disapprove the draft Equality Act 2010 guidance laid on 21 May 2026: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/770527
